description: Style Note Three times the fun with this pack of three tees from campbell! Easy to wear, easy care, practical T-shirts for the no-nonsense guy who doesn't have time to worry about his clothes - just grab and go for a fuss-free look. Product Details Pack of 3 round neck t-shirts with short sleeves in olive green, beige and black, has printed label for irritation-free comfort Material and Care 100% premium cotton Machine wash cold Do not bleach Tumble dry low or dry in shade inside out Warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
